Jeffery,
There is a possibility of acquiring a very stately mansion in top shape with a commercial overlay one would be about 40 and one magnificent one at 60 million.  Do you have any interest in those price points?  The 60 million we could deliver in 30 – 60 days at soonest.  The  40 million will take a bit of time for me to deliver – perhaps 3 months to get them to sell it and 6 – 8 months to move them.
Leighton
